title: In Silence with Optimization and Shaders Mods
description: In Silence ModPack by HuJoe [A Co-op Horror Game], but with Sodium and Insanity Shader!
body:
**ModPack by HuJoe.
Modified by DavideFox1.**

Modpack modified, now contains optimization mods and shaders!

This ModPack is not the original. The Original ModPack is made by HuJoe.

**Added:**
- Iris Shaders by coderbot
- Sodium by CaffeineMC
- ModernFix by embeddedt
- Insanity Shader by ElocinDev (Best Experience) (Default)
- Solas Shader by Septonious   (Brighter but less immersive)
- Hysteria Shader by ElocinDev (Best Experience)
- Welcome Message by Serilum
  
**Description:**
In Silence is a multiplayer co-op survival game in which 1 player becomes a monster that seeks out the other players. This map is an in-depth recreation of the game, including flashlights, noisemakers, and of course, the monster!

If you wish to turn into the monster or mouse outside of the custom map, you can use /rake or /mouse to toggle on and off the roles.

Note: This download includes a map with a custom datapack, a couple resource packs, and a custom mod. (Modified with shader included)

**Recommendations:**
- Please enable all provided resource packs for the best experience.
- Consider turning down your FOV effects to 20% or lower.
- Consider turning off all music for real silence.
- If you are using the voice chat mod, turn down voice distance to 15 blocks or lower in the config.
- If you don't have access to a server, use a mod like Essentials to host your world.
- (Shaders not recommended but included).

**Video Showcase:**
